{{CargoClone
|name=Saintess of Grain
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=185
|gene1={race} ATK +50
|gene2={race} FAME +50
|gene3=Per 10% HP lost, {race} ATK +60
|gene4=Per 60 Angel Minions in battle,
Troop Fire DMG +6
|gene5=Angel Minion Recovery SPD +1.5%
|gene6=Per 60 Angel Minions in battle,
Troop Fire DMG +10
|gene7=Angel Minion Recovery SPD +2.5%
|}}
